rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM ROY HORSTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Petitioner Alexandra Ward; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion; Request For Judicial Notice; Declaration Of Ciaran O'Sullivan
rulings.Rulings: The previously posted tentative ruling still applies. The motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order based on the prior tentative ruling. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3/29/2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM ROY HORSTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses
rulings.Rulings: The motion to compel further responses is granted. There is no absolute right to refuse discovery based upon a pending dispositive motion. (Mattco Forge, Inc. v. Arthur Young & Co. (1990) 223 Cal.App.3d 1429.) The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice. If further responses are not served within 20 days of the order, the court reserves the right to impose full sanctions (including the cost of the instant motion) upon further motion of the petitioner. The prevailing party must prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than March 29, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM ROY HORSTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Excusing Respondent Lidstrom From Answering Interrogatories, Producing Documents And Admitting Facts, And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: The motion for protective order is denied because the court denies the motion for judgment on the pleadings. The prevailing party must prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3/29/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
